key.description: The key of the Study, which will not change for the lifetime of the Study.

quota.description:
The quota for the Study
If no quota is set for the Study this field will not be present in the response.

name.description:
The name of the Study.

If no study name is set for the Study this field will not be present in the response.

description.description:
The description of the Study.

If no description is set for the Study this field will not be present in the response.

status.description:
A one-character string which specifies the status of the Study:
  • a: Archived
  • p: Coding in progress
  • c: Completed
  • d: Deleted
  • h: On hold
  • r: Review in progress
  • s: Shipping
  • u: Under construction

supervisorKey.description:
The key of the Person who will do revision of coding work

If no supervisor is set for the Study this field will not be present in the response.

clientCompanyKey.description:
The key of the Company for which this coding work is assigned

If no client company is set for the Study this field will not be present in the response.

endCompanyKey.description:
The key of the Company for which this coding work is being performed

If no end customer company is set for the Study this field will not be present in the response.

help.description:
The information about the Study

If no help information is set for the Study this field will not be present in the response.

createDateUtc.description: The UTC date/time the Study was created.

startDateUtc.description:
UTC date/time the Study was started.

If the date is not set yet for the Study this field will not be present in the response.

dueDateUtc.description:
UTC date/time the Study was completed.

If the date is not set yet for the Study this field will not be present in the response.
